name: Gnat
description: A tiny annoying creature found across many parts of the park. It is rarely dangerous through raw damage, but it constantly interrupts and steals attention.
behavior: It buzzes around the player and nearby creatures in short, unpredictable paths. It rarely stays still and loves to exploit ongoing fights to become even more annoying.
interactionWithPlayer: It does not always deal much damage, but it breaks rhythm during larger fights and forces you to look up at the worst possible time.
interactionWithCreatures: It hovers around groups, food, and resources. Rather than controlling an area, its role is to make any nearby fight more irritating.
strategy: If it starts interfering with an important fight, kill it immediately. Ignoring it usually costs free attention and avoidable mistakes.

abilities.name: Boop
abilities.description: It drifts close and gives the player a small shove. More irritating than dangerous.

lootTransformations.description: If the creature is killed with spicy damage or a verified heat effect, compatible meat can become cooked meat.
If the creature is killed with salty damage, compatible meat can become jerky.
